# UC-12.2.35 · Argo CD Out-of-Sync Due to Server-Side Apply Field Manager Conflicts

> **Criticality:** Medium &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Change, Operational &middot; **Status:** Draft

*We watch GitOps sync and Argo signals so clusters stay aligned with the desired configuration in Git.*

---

## Description

Field manager conflicts prevent sync and mask true desired state.

## Value

Surfaces SSA drift that simple `kubectl diff` may miss in multi-controller clusters.

## Implementation

Enable verbose sync errors; join with Kypso/Helm operator audit if present.

## SPL

```spl
index=devops sourcetype="argocd:application"
| search "field manager" OR "ssa" OR "server-side apply" OR "conflict"
| stats count by name, namespace, revision
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Table (apps with conflicts), Bar chart (count by namespace).

## Known False Positives

Drift from manual console fixes during incidents, automated tool changes, or planned config updates outside IaC.

- [Argo CD Splunk integration notes](https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/wiki/Splunk)
